title: Aster DM Healthcare is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Aster DM Healthcare is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Aster DM Healthcare has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Mysuru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Aster DM Healthcare:
Aster DM Healthcare is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aster DM Healthcare!
